rules.title: Correlated attack progression
rules.description: Connected correlations sharing assets or identities form a candidate attack path.

rules.title: Initial Access to Credential Abuse
rules.description: Initial access followed by credential access or lateral movement indicates a plausible intrusion path.

rules.title: Public Exposure to Data Exfiltration
rules.description: Publicly exposed storage or database leading to data collection and exfiltration.

rules.title: Privilege Escalation to Lateral Movement
rules.description: Privilege escalation on a host followed by lateral movement to other systems.

rules.title: Identity Compromise to Cloud Resource Access
rules.description: Compromised identity used to access cloud resources and escalate privileges.

rules.title: Web Application Exploit to Database Access
rules.description: Web application vulnerability exploited to gain database access and exfiltrate data.

rules.title: SSH Brute Force to Lateral Movement
rules.description: SSH brute force attack leading to initial access and lateral movement.

rules.title: Identity Compromise via MFA Gap
rules.description: Attacker exploits accounts lacking MFA to gain unauthorized access to identity infrastructure
